atpSteps: 1. Open app → 2. I'll do it later → 3. Accept terms → 4. Skip onboarding → 5. Tap camera icon (bottom-right) → 6. Verify camera screen
atpExpected: User should be able to open the app's camera from the gallery

testName: CA_02 - Open camera go back to gallery
atpSteps: 1. Open app → 2. Tap camera icon located at the bottom-right of the screen → 3. Tap return icon located at the top-left of the screen
atpExpected: User should be able to open the app camera and go back to gallery

atpSteps: Capture and print from camera (shifted from legacy CSV CA_02; confirm steps in Kodak Step Print ATP 2026.xlsx)
atpExpected: User should be able to capture a photo from the camera and proceed to print

atpSteps: Open camera → switch to selfie → capture → verify preview
atpExpected: User should be able to capture a selfie photo using the front camera

atpSteps: Open camera → enable flash → capture → verify preview → close preview → verify camera
atpExpected: User should be able to capture a photo with the flash enabled

atpSteps: Open camera → swipe live filter → capture → verify preview
atpExpected: User should be able to capture a photo after applying a live filter

atpSteps: 1. Open camera → 2. Tap Scan → 3. Dismiss AR Scan tip → 4. Verify AR scan screen → 5. Return to camera
atpExpected: User should be able to open AR scan from the camera screen

atpSteps: 1. Attempt to open camera from gallery → 2. Deny camera permission → 3. Verify camera did not open
atpExpected: When camera permission is denied, the user cannot use the camera

atpSteps: 1. Open camera → 2–4. Capture three photos in succession → 5. Verify camera remains on capture screen
atpExpected: User should be able to capture multiple photos rapidly without leaving the camera

atpSteps: 1. Open camera → 2. Capture photo → 3. Verify low-storage error message
atpExpected: When device storage is full, capturing a photo shows an appropriate error
notes: Requires device near full storage; may be skipped in CI

atpSteps: 1. Open camera → 2–4. Switch front/back camera three times → 5. Verify flip control and capture button remain available
atpExpected: User should be able to switch between front and rear cameras repeatedly without failure
